{{Quote|Group leader, this is Polearm One. I've found the ''Iron Fist''.|Todra Mayn|<ref name="X-Wing: Solo Command">''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Todra Mayn''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] from [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] who served the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. She was the daughter of [[Lela Nalle Mayn]].

==Biography==
During the [[Hunt for Zsinj|hunt]] for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]], Todra was the leader of [[Polearm Squadron]], a veteran unit of [[A-wing]]s assigned to the ''[[Mon Remonda]]''. She participated in many of the key engagements against Zsinj, including the [[Battle of Selaggis]]. During the battle, Todra discovered the [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']] hiding in a debris ring during her reconnaissance run.

A little over three years into the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Todra became [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the modified [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] [[Pride of Selonia (Lancer-class)|''Pride of Selonia'']]. She had received some injuries during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] and been relegated to a reserve role. However, she was assigned to escort the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] during its journey to sectors of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] that had lost communications with the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. She successfully oversaw engagements at [[Galantos]], [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]], and [[Esfandia/Legends|Esfandia]].
